Notice Of Motion; Noton To Compel Discovey Responses, To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted, And For Sanctions;
Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Patrick Connally's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories (set #1 and #2), request for production of documents (set #1 and #2), and to deem certain matters admitted as to defendant Zhongxing Development Inc. is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and to produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. The matters set forth in plaintiff's requests for admissions are ordered admitted. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $540 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2007 Set For Trial On Dec-10-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Nov-21-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 602
